name: North Texas-Style Red Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds beef chuck, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup kettle or Dutch oven over medium-high heat, brown beef in olive oil, stirring constantly.
2. Add beef broth to cover the meat. If necessary, add water to make enough liquid.
3. Add chopped onion and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients; reduce heat; cover and simmer for 3 hours or until meat is tender.
